family5_role: Different descriptive estimand; shown as contextual evidence only and not used to categorize any continuous-decomposition hypothesis.
limitations: The frozen plans do not map named NOAA regions to the qualitative eastern, much-of-the-East, or western hypothesis phrases.
The frozen plans do not define whether a point-estimate sign or an interval relation constitutes directional evidence.
The frozen plans do not quantify tend, much, weaker, heterogeneous, or potentially opposing.
The frozen plans do not define how regional evidence is aggregated or how sensitivity disagreement affects a hypothesis status.
The descriptive elevated-ozone percentage-point change is not the continuous A/B/C/D decomposition estimand.
The observational response component is associational and not a causal emissions, wildfire, policy, regulatory, or climate effect.
Within-site residual autocorrelation and incompletely represented cross-site spatial dependence limit uncertainty interpretation.
Represented monitoring sites are not population-weighted exposure estimates for U.S. people or places.
region_handling: Evidence is reported by the ten committed named scopes (national and nine NOAA regions). No post-result eastern/western grouping is created.
status: not formally adjudicable under the frozen plan
